mirror.description: Contour stores a closed loop: right side (indices 0..726) is extracted from the image; left side (indices 727..1199) is the mirror reflection collapsed to dx≈0 along the midline. Only the right half-contour is geometrically meaningful. Symmetry measurements and landmarks reference the right half. To reconstruct the full symmetric silhouette, mirror the right side about dx=0.

coordinate_system.dx: horizontal distance from midline in head-units (HU). Positive = right of midline.
coordinate_system.dy: vertical position in HU. 0 = top of figure, increasing downward.
coordinate_system.hu_definition: 1 HU = crown-to-neck_valley distance (full head height including cranium above widest point)

signals.note: Confidence raised: high stroke count (50) correlates with armor panels/detail lines
Confidence raised: shoulder_hip_ratio=0.812 and waist_hip_ratio=0.421 are strong female indicators

view.label: front
view.note: Disambiguated from front_or_back to front based on visor detail strokes and zipper line

hair_symmetry.label: asymmetric
hair_symmetry.note: Corrected: ponytail exits right side of helmet, creating measurable asymmetry at dy=1.0. Previous 'symmetric' label was incorrect — was computed on mirrored contour, not raw.

annotations.label: multi_figure
annotations.note: Two smaller reference views detected in lower-right region of image

landmarks.name: neck_valley
landmarks.description: Narrowest point between head and shoulders

landmarks.name: waist_valley
landmarks.description: Narrowest torso width (may be armpit on arms-down pose)

landmarks.name: ankle_valley
landmarks.description: Narrowest point at ankle joint, above boot sole
landmarks.note: Corrected from boot sole to ankle joint

symmetry.note: Measured from raw contour right-side only. delta = |right_dx - left_dx|. Left values are from mirrored right; nonzero deltas indicate measurement noise or ponytail asymmetry.

measurements.note: Scanline intersections at each dy level. right_dx/left_dx are absolute distances from midline. topology field disambiguates which side of midline each intersection falls on.

segments.label: shoulder_peak_to_waist_valley
segments.complexity_note: Segment spans arm-occluded torso region; contour is non-monotonic, requiring many knots for faithful parametrization.

segments.label: waist_valley_to_hip_peak
segments.complexity_note: Segment spans arm-occluded torso region; contour is non-monotonic, requiring many knots for faithful parametrization.

segments.label: hip_peak_to_knee_valley
segments.complexity_note: Segment spans arm-occluded torso region; contour is non-monotonic, requiring many knots for faithful parametrization.
